name: Chicken Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
Chicken breast (about 2 1/4 pounds total), skinned, boned, and halved  1/2 of a 10-ounce package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained.
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine the Parmesan cheese and Italian seasoning. Roll each chicken piece in the cheese mixture to coat lightly; set aside any remaining mixture.
2. Arrange the chicken pieces in an 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
3. In a small saucepan, cook the green onion in hot margarine until tender. Stir in flour, then add milk all at once. Cook and stir until bubbly, stirring in the thawed and drained spinach and pimiento.
4. Spoon the spinach mixture over the chicken pieces and sprinkle with the remaining cheese mixture.
5. Bake, uncovered, in a 350°F oven for 30 to 35 minutes, or until tender.
